name: Cash Converters International
analysis: It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.7× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3000, stop A$0.2822, target A$0.3320 (1.79:1) — then trail it.
